title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Delhi Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Delhi Global Group
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi Global Group:
IIT Delhi Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi Global Group!
